content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running, Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition year-round. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services — from boat surveying and inspection to diving and underwater work, marine AC and climate control, and marine plumbing and sanitation — all under one roof. Whether you're a weekend cruiser or a liveaboard, we're built to handle what your boat needs.

Our team brings hands-on expertise across the full spectrum of marine systems. We conduct thorough boat surveys and pre-purchase inspections so buyers and owners know exactly what they're working with. Our divers handle hull inspections, underwater repairs, and bottom cleaning without the hassle of a haul-out. We install, service, and troubleshoot marine air conditioning and climate control systems to keep your cabin comfortable in any conditions. And when it comes to marine plumbing and sanitation — from through-hulls to holding tanks — we do it right the first time.

Ben's Boatworks proudly serves boat owners across South Florida and the surrounding waters, operating within a 60-mile radius and bringing the same commitment to quality whether we're dockside in Annapolis or out on the water with you. We understand that your boat represents a significant investment, and we treat every vessel like it's our own. If you need reliable marine services from a team that knows boats inside and out, Ben's Boatworks is ready to help.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, marine AC, diving services & plumbing across South Florida. Call us today!

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: Ben's Boatworks performs detailed boat surveys and pre-purchase inspections to give vessel owners and buyers a clear, accurate picture of a boat's condition. We assess structural integrity, mechanical systems, and safety equipment so you can make informed decisions and avoid costly surprises down the road.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our diving team handles a full range of underwater services including hull inspections, propeller checks, zinc replacement, and underwater repairs — all without requiring a costly haul-out. We get below the waterline quickly and efficiently to keep your vessel seaworthy and your schedule on track.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Ben's Boatworks installs, services, and repairs marine air conditioning and climate control systems to keep your cabin comfortable in hot or humid conditions. We work with a variety of marine HVAC systems and diagnose issues from refrigerant levels to compressor performance to keep everything running efficiently.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: We handle all aspects of marine plumbing and sanitation, including through-hull fittings, raw water systems, bilge pump installation, and holding tank service and repair. Proper marine sanitation is critical for both vessel safety and environmental compliance, and we make sure every system is installed and maintained to the right standard.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection for buyers
Underwater hull cleaning and zinc anode replacement without haul-out
Marine air conditioning installation and refrigerant system service
Holding tank repair and marine sanitation system overhaul
Through-hull fitting inspection, replacement, and seacock servicing
Propeller inspection and underwater running gear assessment by divers
Bilge pump installation and raw water plumbing system troubleshooting
